hero.title: Full Stack, Mobile & AI Developer
hero.subtitle: I build complete products — frontend to backend, mobile to cloud. I modernize platforms, optimize databases, and craft Android apps with Kotlin. All fueled by curiosity and coffee.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Full Stack, Mobile & AI Developer
about.paragraph1: I'm Paulo Llanos, a developer with 5+ years shipping production software. I work across the stack — React, Node.js, .NET, Python, Kotlin — solving real business problems, not just writing code.
about.paragraph2: At Belcorp I lead platform modernization, database optimization, and Android development. I manage small teams with rigorous code review and mentor juniors toward autonomy.
about.paragraph3: I care about the intersection of tech and product. The best code solves a real problem — not the one that looks clever in a repo. Exploring AI agents and LLMs to build smarter solutions.

items.label: Linux & Open Source
items.desc: Daily driving CachyOS and Omarchy with Hyprland. Tiling, ricing, and kernel tweaking are my happy place.

items.label: Cycling
items.desc: Road and mountain. Nothing clears the mind like a long ride.

items.label: Tinkering & Reverse Engineering
items.desc: Breaking things to understand how they work. Desktop apps, APIs, game modding — if it runs, I want to peek inside.

items.label: Tech Obsession
items.desc: Building tools, automating workflows, and staying on the edge of what's possible in software.

items.label: Music
items.desc: Hip-hop, jazz rap, boom bap, lo-fi, metal and indie. Tribe Called Quest, Deftones, Joji, Slipknot, Mac DeMarco — if it hits, it's in the rotation. Music is fuel for deep work.

items.label: Open Source
items.desc: Believer in open ecosystems. Contributing, tinkering, and advocating for software freedom. Linux, FOSS tools, and community-driven development.

items.label: Android Ecosystem
items.desc: Passionate about the Android platform — from Kotlin development to custom ROMs. The openness and flexibility of the OS is what makes it special.

items.label: Gaming
items.desc: Ranked Apex Legends and Dota 2. Competitive gaming teaches pattern recognition, fast decision-making, and staying calm under pressure.

highlights.modernDesc: Large-scale .NET modernization at Belcorp, zero downtime
highlights.leadDesc: Small teams, code review, decisions that scale
highlights.pubDesc: Blockchain + FHIR HL7 for healthcare interoperability

about.highlightDesc: My research on Blockchain + FHIR HL7 for electronic health record interoperability was published in a Q2 international journal. Technology meets real healthcare impact.

professional.title: Join Belcorp
professional.description: Consultant registration platform powering operations across 12 countries. Modernized the backend stack, optimized database performance, and built Android features with Kotlin.

professional.title: Rimac Monitoring Center
professional.description: Real-time insurance monitoring platform. Modernized the frontend architecture, upgraded the runtime, and built geospatial features with interactive map layers.

professional.title: HolaLink
professional.description: Serverless web platform on AWS Lambda with Amplify auth. Mobile-first UI and comprehensive test coverage with Jest.

personal.title: MCA Makeup
personal.description: Booking platform for a professional makeup artist. Real-time calendar, testimonials system, and full admin panel.

personal.title: Chicama Map
personal.description: Interactive map and directory of local places in Chicama. Public discovery flow and admin content management.

personal.title: BioChain
personal.description: Healthcare interoperability platform with FHIR R4 and SMART on FHIR. Blockchain for data integrity and traceability.

personal.title: Personal Finances
personal.description: Personal finance tracker with expense dashboard, categories, budgets, and JWT auth. Bun + Elysia backend.

personal.title: Peru in Map
personal.description: Place discovery app for Peru. Astro frontend, Hono backend, offline-capable as a PWA.

personal.title: GitHub Profile Fetcher
personal.description: API built with Bun and Elysia for querying public GitHub profiles. In-memory caching and structured logging.

personal.title: Carioca Game Web
personal.description: Browser card-game interface experiment. TypeScript with a focus on responsive UX.

personal.title: YT-DLP GUI Electron
personal.description: Desktop GUI for automating downloads with yt-dlp. Built with Electron and TypeScript.
